ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_name" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "episode_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the episode */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Director of the episode */,
  "written_by" INTEGER /* Writers of the episode */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the episode */,
  "viewers_millions" REAL /* Number of viewers in millions */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the episode (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the season belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "season_title" TEXT /* Title or name of the season */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the season */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the series */,
  "series_title" TEXT /* Title of the series */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the series (e.g., Drama, Comedy) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the series was first released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the series */,
  "total_seasons" INTEGER /* Total number of seasons in the series */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., Director, Writer) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the creator was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the creator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_creators" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the creator in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "creator_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing statistic entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "viewers_millions" REAL /* Number of viewers in millions for a specific viewing date */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the viewership data */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the episode was viewed (e.g., TV, Streaming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_statistics_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode associated with the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award received */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Drama, Best Actor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_genres" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "genre_id")
)
